query:
INSERT INTO objects
               (id, ap_id, object_type, attributed_to, actor_id, content,
                content_map, summary, sensitive, in_reply_to, published,
                url, ap_json, visibility)
               VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
               ON CONFLICT (ap_id) DO NOTHING
